name: sparrow-engine
summary: Camera-trap ML inference engine — Python API only (sparrow-engine CPU pipeline). The CLI binary (spe / spe-gpu) and HTTP server are NOT shipped via pip; install them via brew, the system installer (sparrow-engine-install.sh / .ps1), or the GitHub Release tarball. See https://github.com/microsoft/Pytorch-Wildlife/blob/sparrow-engine-dev/docs/user-manual.md
